record.field: Industry Lawyer: Split SO per Claimant

# ctx = record._context # active_model = ctx.get('default_model') or ctx.get('active_model') # active_id = ctx.get('default_res_ids', [])[:1] or ctx.get('active_id') # current_record = env[active_model].browse(active_id) mail_compose_partners = record.partner_ids suggested_approval = mail_compose_partners[:1].mapped('x_suggest_approval') if suggested_approval: record.write({'x_approval': suggested_approval[:1]}) partners = [(4, pid) for pid in set(mail_compose_partners.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimants').ids)] record.write({'partner_ids': partners, 'x_is_user_high_group': env.user.has_group('industry_lawyer.group_high')})
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Mail Compose

ctx = record._context active_model = ctx.get('active_model') active_id = ctx.get('active_id') current_record = env[active_model].browse(active_id)
# instead of current_record we can use record.move_id
record['x_current_record_id'] = current_record.id # if not record.mail_partner_ids: record['mail_partner_ids'] = [(6, 0, current_record.partner_id.ids)] mail_compose_partners = record.mail_partner_ids suggested_approval = mail_compose_partners[:1].mapped('x_suggest_approval') if suggested_approval: record.write({'x_invoice_approval_by': suggested_approval[0]}) partners = [(4, pid) for pid in set(mail_compose_partners.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimants').ids)] record.write({'mail_partner_ids': partners, 'x_is_user_high_groups': env.user.has_group('industry_lawyer.group_high')})
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Account Move Send

for wizard in records: wizard.partner_ids.write({'x_suggest_approval': wizard.x_approval}) mail = env['mail.mail'].create({'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, [attach.id for attach in wizard.attachment_ids])], 'body_html': wizard.body or '', 'partner_ids': wizard.partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_approved_by_uid': env.user.id, 'scheduled_date': wizard.scheduled_date, 'subject': wizard.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, wizard.partner_ids.ids)], 'reply_to': wizard.reply_to or False,}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_mail': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) if wizard.x_approval: high_group_user_mail = mail.copy({'x_approved_by_uid': wizard.x_approval.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_mail': high_group_user_mail.id})

for wizard in records: # wizard.move_id.invoice_pdf_report_id attachment_ids = [attachment.get('id') for attachment in wizard.mail_attachments_widget] mail = env['mail.mail'].create({ # 'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, [wizard.move_id.invoice_pdf_report_id.id])], 'body_html': wizard.body or '', 'partner_ids': wizard.mail_partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_approved_by_uid': env.user.id, 'subject': wizard.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, wizard.mail_partner_ids.ids)],}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_mail': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) if wizard.x_invoice_approval_by: high_group_user_mail = mail.copy({'x_approved_by_uid': wizard.x_invoice_approval_by.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_mail': high_group_user_mail.id})
Industry Lawyer: Submit For Approval in Account Move Send
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_mail.write({'state': 'outgoing'})
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'cancelled'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_mail.write({'state': 'cancel'})
